description: BigqueryTableFreshnessCheckComponent — SLO check on max-age of a BQ table.

max_age_minutes.label: Max Age Minutes
max_age_minutes.description: Max age of the table's last_modified_time. Check fails if exceeded.

use_partition_freshness.label: Use Partition Freshness
use_partition_freshness.description: If True and the table is partitioned, check the freshest partition's modification time instead of the table-level last_modified_time. Useful for ingest-time partitioned tables that grow daily.

blocking.label: Blocking
blocking.description: Default False — SLO checks usually alert, not block.

name: Bigquery Table Freshness Check
